rows.label: tlk45320159_02_msg0001
rows.name:
You must be the Drivers whom Special
Inquisitor Meleph spoke of.

rows.label: tlk45320159_02_msg0002
rows.name:
Sorry to disappoint, but I haven't
seen suspicious goods pass through
here these past few days.

rows.label: tlk45320159_02_msg0003
rows.name:
All goods I've seen were
ordinary. Though we weren't
inspecting them all that closely.

rows.label: tlk45320159_02_msg0004
rows.name:
What we have been on the lookout
for is that mechanical Blade.

rows.label: tlk45320159_02_msg0005
rows.name:
That's why we found her so
quickly that night. Though she
wound up giving us a thrashing.
